languages.text: {n}Воин медленно, тяжело поднимается с платформы и направляется к вам. Несмотря на суровую гримасу, сковавшую черты его лица, во взгляде читается облегчение.{/n} "Благодарю, человек. Твоя помощь была своевременна".
{n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."
languages.original_text: {n}Воин медленно, тяжело поднимается с платформы и направляется к вам. Несмотря на суровую гримасу, сковавшую черты его лица, во взгляде читается облегчение.{/n} "Благодарю, человек. Твоя помощь была своевременна".

languages.text: {n}ゆっくりと重厚に、戦士は壇上から立ち上がってあなたに向かって歩く。厳しい表情の彼だが、眼には真の感謝が宿っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine gratitude in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ゆっくりと重厚に、戦士は壇上から立ち上がってあなたに向かって歩く。厳しい表情の彼だが、眼には真の感謝が宿っている。

languages.text: {n}De forma lenta y pesada, el guerrero se levanta de la plataforma y anda hacia ti. Pese a su arisco aspecto, ves un alivio sincero en su mirada.{/n} «Te lo agradezco, human{mf|o|a}. Tu ayuda llega en el momento idóneo».
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."

traits.locale_text: {n}De forma lenta y pesada, el guerrero se levanta de la plataforma y anda hacia ti. Pese a su arisco aspecto, ves un alivio sincero en su mirada.{/n} «Te lo agradezco, human{mf|o|a}. Tu ayuda llega en el momento idóneo».

languages.text: {n}Der Krieger verlässt langsam und schwerfällig die Plattform und kommt auf dich zu. Trotz seiner versteinerten Miene erkennst du Erleichterung in seinen Augen.{/n} "Ich danke Euch, Mensch. Eure Hilfe kam zur rechten Zeit."
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Krieger verlässt langsam und schwerfällig die Plattform und kommt auf dich zu. Trotz seiner versteinerten Miene erkennst du Erleichterung in seinen Augen.{/n} "Ich danke Euch, Mensch. Eure Hilfe kam zur rechten Zeit."

languages.text: {n}Au prix d'un immense effort, le guerrier se lève de la plateforme et s'approche de vous. Malgré son visage strict, vous lisez un soulagement sincère dans son regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie, {mf|humain|humaine}. Votre aide est arrivée à point nommé. »
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."

traits.locale_text: {n}Au prix d'un immense effort, le guerrier se lève de la plateforme et s'approche de vous. Malgré son visage strict, vous lisez un soulagement sincère dans son regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie, {mf|humain|humaine}. Votre aide est arrivée à point nommé. »

languages.text: {n}战士缓慢而沉重地自平台起身，朝你走来。尽管面色冷峻，你仍能从他眼中看到发自内心的宽慰。{/n}“谢谢你，凡人。你的援助很及时。”
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."

traits.locale_text: {n}战士缓慢而沉重地自平台起身，朝你走来。尽管面色冷峻，你仍能从他眼中看到发自内心的宽慰。{/n}“谢谢你，凡人。你的援助很及时。”

languages.text: {n}Savaşçı, yavaş ve ağır bir şekilde platformdan kalkıp sana doğru yürüyor. Sert yüz hatlarına rağmen gözlerinde samimi bir rahatlama görüyorsun.{/n} "Sana teşekkür ederim insan. Tam vaktinde yetiştin."
languages.original_text: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."
